disambiguated.context: A general knowledge quiz show approached a professor and a server about being contestants. Both had to take a test beforehand to see if they should be on the show. The professor got nearly every answer wrong and was excluded because they wouldn't be a good contestant, but the server scored well and was selected.
disambiguated.question: Who is intelligent?
